name: stray-skillops
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for skill authoring, routing validation, evals, and subagent operations.

interface.shortDescription: Author, validate, evaluate, and coordinate a healthy skill and subagent system.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local Codex plugin for skill and subagent operations. It helps agents create and refine SKILL.md files for this plugin family or project-scoped `.agents/skills/`, find reusable skill patterns, validate trigger and near-miss routing cases, create project or explicitly requested personal subagents, design multi-agent workflows, add AI evals to CI, and compress long-running task context with provenance and continuity.
defaultPrompt: Find existing skills before creating a new one.
Create a new Codex skill in this plugin family.
Create or update a project-scoped Codex skill under .agents/skills/ without scaffolding a plugin.
Update an existing skill's trigger description, scope, or workflow.
Clean up a skill so it is narrower, instruction-first, and easier to invoke correctly.
Design, validate, and repair positive and near-miss routing cases for a local Codex skill set.
Compare candidate skill patterns and decide whether to adopt, adapt, or create new.
Compress a long-running task without losing file paths, decisions, or next steps.
Design a multi-agent workflow with clear handoffs and quality gates.
Add AI or agent evals to CI so regressions fail the build.
Create or update a custom Codex subagent under .codex/agents/ for a specific workflow.
